title: podochilus spathulatus
intro: Podochilus spathulatus, also known as the Spathulata orchid, is a type of orchid plant native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Podochilus spathulatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
